file: 1522_Bortov 等 - 1988 - Production of base component of B-91115 aviation gasoline by the use of a metal zeolite catalyst.txt

experiments.description: 在装有金属沸石催化剂的试验装置中，对西伯利亚原油的62-150°C直馏石脑油馏分进行催化重整。实验条件为：温度420-460°C，原料空速2-7 h⁻¹，压力3 MPa，富氢气体循环比1000升/升原料。目的是将原料中的正构烷烃和环烷烃转化为芳烃和异构烷烃，生产航空汽油的基础组分。
experiments.text_snippet: Our experiments were conducted in a pilot plant with recirculation of hydrogen-rich gas... The influence of process parameters on the quality of the reformate obtained from the 62-150° feedstock was investigated at 420-460°C with a feedstock space velocity of 2-7 h -l, a pressure of 3 MPa, and a hydrogen-rich gas recycle ratio of i000 liters/liter feed

Feedstock.original: 62-150°C straight-run naphtha cut from West Siberian crude

Reactant molar ratio.original: 1000 liters hydrogen-rich gas per liter feed

Operation mode.value: Pilot plant with recirculation of hydrogen-rich gas
Operation mode.original: Pilot plant with recirculation of hydrogen-rich gas
